sections.paragraph:
Original: חשׂפא חשׂוּפא

Transliteration: chăśûphâ' chăśûphâ'

Phonetic: khas-oo-faw'

BDB Definition:

Hasupha or Hashupha = "stripped"
  1. head of the family of temple slaves returning from exile in the

Origin: from H2834

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
